meta.title: Avoo | CRM, calendar and portfolio for beauty professionals
meta.description: New clients, easy booking and less chaos for beauty professionals.

featureSection.eyebrow: Booking software that pays for itself
featureSection.title: See your day clearly and keep every client in motion.

scheduling.title: Stay on top of every booking
scheduling.description: Drag, reschedule and balance your day without losing context or double-booking.
scheduling.stat: Save up to 6 hours every week

reminders.title: Automate reminders and follow-ups
reminders.description: Reduce empty slots with timed messages, confirmations and no-show protection.
reminders.stat: Cut missed appointments by up to 35%

portfolio.title: Turn portfolio views into revenue
portfolio.description: Keep services, before and after photos, and offers in one place clients can trust instantly.

calculator.label: Value calculator
calculator.title: Revenue recovered in 90 days
calculator.description: Small workflow fixes compound quickly when your calendar, client history and portfolio live together.
calculator.caption: Estimated gain for a two-person studio switching from spreadsheets and direct messages.

testimonial.quote: "Avoo gave us one calm place for scheduling, reminders and portfolio updates. Clients book faster and my team finally sees the same day."
testimonial.author: Michael Chen

second.quote: "AVOO completely transformed how I manage my salon. No more double bookings, no more chaos — just a clean, organized schedule every day."
second.author: Emma Ponsko

signup.title: Grow your beauty business with Avoo
signup.terms: I accept the terms and privacy policy

decor.eyebrow: More clients. One calendar. Zero chaos.
decor.title: A lightweight workflow for beauty professionals who want room to grow.
decor.description: Built for specialists who need a booking system that feels lighter, faster and easier to trust.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.description: Common questions about Avoo and how it can help your beauty business

free.question: Is Avoo free to use?
free.answer: Avoo offers a free starting flow with optional premium features. You can test the core workflow at no cost and upgrade when your business is ready.

size.question: Does Avoo support businesses of all sizes?
size.answer: Yes. Avoo works for independent professionals, growing salons and distributed teams. The setup scales from one chair to multiple locations.

skills.question: Do I need technical skills?
skills.answer: No. The platform is designed to be straightforward from day one, so you can manage bookings, reminders and your portfolio without technical training.

setup.question: How quickly can I set up?
setup.answer: Most professionals complete their profile and start accepting bookings in under 15 minutes.

faq.contactText: Our team is ready to help you choose the right setup.

page.sertificatesPlaceholder: This is the certificates tab. Here we will display the salon's certificates and awards,showcasing their expertise and commitment to excellence in the beauty industry. Stay tuned for updates as we gather and share the salon's achievements!
page.galleryPlaceholder: One day, when the sun is shining and the birds are singing, we will fill this gallery tab with beautiful photos of the salon's work. Stay tuned for stunning transformations and happy clients!
